title: How to Hit 10M Views in 7 Days 🚀
description: Stop posting random videos and start using this viral blueprint. 📈 From hooks to retention, here is your 7-day roadmap to explosive growth. #tiktokgrowth #contentstrategy #viraltips #socialmediamarketing
topic: How to get 10M views on TikTok in 7 days.

slides.topSection: Left: random clips, Right: blurry text, Red X in center, Caption: Posting without a clear plan
slides.bottomSection: Left: niche focus, Right: high quality, Green check in center, Caption: Following a strategic roadmap

slides.topSection: Left: slow intro, Right: silent start, Red X in center, Caption: Losing viewers in first seconds
slides.bottomSection: Left: bold text, Right: fast movement, Green check in center, Caption: Grabbing attention immediately

slides.topSection: Left: long pauses, Right: boring loops, Red X in center, Caption: Letting the energy drop
slides.bottomSection: Left: quick cuts, Right: subtitles, Green check in center, Caption: Keeping viewers watching longer

slides.topSection: Left: vague captions, Right: no hashtags, Red X in center, Caption: Making content hard to find
